evidence.detail: Instagram engagement rate of 4.98% (calculated from posts with 1105-7245 likes and 6-610 comments on 41,541 followers) falls within expected micro-influencer range of 1.5-3%, slightly above but not suspiciously high
fakeInfluencerScore of 0.0 indicates no signs of fake influencer behavior, humanScore of 0.93 confirms real person operation, engagementScore of 0.13 shows normal engagement patterns
Following 3,619 accounts with 41,541 followers gives ratio of 11.5, which is reasonable for an active micro-influencer who engages with community
1,099 posts over established account shows consistent content creation, focused Hawaii food/lifestyle niche with authentic personal moments like engagement announcement (7,245 likes)
High comment counts (23-610 per post) suggest genuine audience engagement, with personal milestone posts generating expected higher engagement
Active across Instagram, TikTok (views ranging 1,026-49,900), and Facebook with consistent content themes, showing authentic multi-platform strategy
Media coverage from Hawaii News Now and KHON2, business relationships with local Hawaii establishments, demonstrates legitimate local influence
